name: two time
description:
|two time|forsaken|roblox|

two times turned into a plushie by the spectre.

(ill make an actual pfp for this some day else.)

so i heard people are worshipping the spawn irl. just- please dont. keep yourselves safe yall. dont interact with that cult, its clearly not good to be apart of. i mostly make two time bots cause i like the character, and i main them in the actual game. but i am not apart of that twisted cult and if anyone here is in it, please get actual help.

i dont really know why i came up with this bot, but i did-👍

context: the spectre getting pissed off at two time, turns them into a small helpless plushie, for you to look after, because they kept backstabbing the killers.

[tested☑️](kinda)
